info.title: JEA Demo Express API Documentation
info.description: Detailed API documentation for the JEA Demo Express Backend, exposing separate CRUD services.

post.description: Authenticate an administrator or agent, handles optional OTP verification, and returns a JWT token.

otp.description: Optional OTP required on second step.

200.description: Login Successful or OTP Step Requested

requireOtp.description: True if credentials are correct but OTP is still needed.

get.description: Retrieve general count statistics and recent message logs for the admin dashboard.
List all active chat conversation sessions with latest message details.
Retrieve chronological message log for a specific chat session.

patch.description: Enable or disable support human handover (human vs bot mode) for a session.
Change session status between OPEN, CLOSED, or PENDING.

get.description: Welcome message and API entry details.

message.example: Welcome to the JEA Demo Express Backend API

get.description: Retrieve available API endpoints.
Get current API online status and timestamp.
Retrieve detailed system health, uptime, and memory usage metrics.

post.description: Send a WhatsApp message using Twilio API. Requires configured Twilio credentials in the .env file.

message.description: The message body content (optional if file is provided)

file.description: Local file (image/PDF) to upload and send (optional if message is provided)

message.description: The message body content (optional if mediaUrl is provided)

mediaUrl.description: Public URL of an image or PDF to send (optional if message is provided)

post.description: Webhook endpoint to receive incoming WhatsApp messages from Twilio. Returns Twilio Messaging TwiML XML.

200.description: TwiML XML response acknowledging receipt and replying

schema.example: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Response><Message>Hello! We received your message: "Hello JEA API"</Message></Response>

get.description: Retrieve a list of User records with support for limit/offset pagination and filters.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Primary key identifier of the User

get.description: Fetch information for a single User by primary key.

put.description: Modify attributes of an existing User by primary key.

delete.description: Remove a User record by primary key.

post.description: Uploads a multipart form file to the local FTP server and returns the file link.

file.description: The file to upload to the FTP server (maximum size 10MB)

200.description: File uploaded successfully to FTP storage

message.example: File uploaded successfully to FTP storage.
